headlines.headline: Down 0-2? Donovan Mitchell and the Cavaliers have been here before
headlines.description: Through a roller-coaster season, the Cavaliers have turned to one man in times of trouble.

headlines.headline: Wembanyama on Spurs' Game 3 loss: Got to be better 'team player'
headlines.description: Victor Wembanyama had a team-high 26 points but acknowledged he needs to be "more of a team player" after the Spurs lost 123-108 in Game 3 and trail the Thunder 2-1 in the Western Conference finals.

headlines.headline: Oklahoma City visits San Antonio with 2-1 series lead
headlines.description: Oklahoma City Thunder (64-18, first in the Western Conference) vs. San Antonio Spurs (62-20, second in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: Stephen A. breaks down Thunder's Game 3 victory on the road
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith weighs in on how the Thunder secured a Game 3 win in San Antonio.

headlines.headline: SGA after Thunder erase 15-0 deficit to take 2-1 series lead
headlines.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander speaks following the Thunder's Game 3 win over the Spurs and responds to Spurs fans' chants toward him during the game.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
headlines.description: The 2026 NBA playoffs are underway. Keep up with every series right here.

headlines.headline: Florida signs 'Teddy Bridgewater Act,' lets coaches aid players
headlines.description: Florida has signed the "Teddy Bridgewater Act" into law, meaning high school coaches in the state will now be able to use their own money to help their players with expenses such as food, transportation, physical therapy and rehabilitation services.

headlines.headline: Dolphins want Malik Willis focused on offense, not leadership, for now
headlines.description: Willis signed a three-year, $67.5 million contract this offseason because the Dolphins believe he can be their franchise quarterback.

headlines.headline: Brian Burns doing it all for his nephew, autism awareness
headlines.description: Giants defensive veteran Brian Burns' success has opened doors for him to show his true purpose.

headlines.headline: Seahawks notebook: Latest on Devon Witherspoon's extension
headlines.description: With OTAs ramping up, what's the latest news in Seattle? Seven things of note from this week.

headlines.headline: Bears relying on Montez Sweat, same unit to fix pass rush
headlines.description: Will better coaching be enough to fix a unit that ranked 31st in pass rush win rate?

headlines.headline: Jacoby Brissett not close to reworked deal with Cardinals
headlines.description: A reworked deal between the Arizona Cardinals and quarterback Jacoby Brissett is still not close, a source told ESPN on Friday.

headlines.headline: Latvia hands U.S. its third loss at ice hockey worlds
headlines.description: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 for the defending champion's third loss at the ice hockey world championship.

headlines.headline: How the Canadiens mastered the art of 'bouncing forward'
headlines.description: Montreal is seven wins from the Stanley Cup thanks to contributions up and down the lineup.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: It was all Canadiens in Game 1. Plus, highlights from Avs-Golden Knights Game 2 and updated playoff stats.

headlines.headline: Golden Knights take 2-0 lead into game 3 against the Avalanche
headlines.description: Colorado Avalanche (55-16-11, in the Central Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: Avalanche lament missed opportunities after loss to Knights
headlines.description: Avalanche coach Jared Bednar said his team had chances to extend its 1-0 lead before losing 3-1 to the Golden Knights in Game 2 of the Western Conference finals.

headlines.headline: Golden Knights-Avalanche Game 2 takeaways, grades, early look at Game 3
headlines.description: What stood out most from the Golden Knights' win in Game 2 of the Western Conference finals, and what to look for in Game 3 on Sunday.
